scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:calc && npm run test:pricing
scripts.test:api: npm run quality:api && docker run --rm ocidisblueprint-api-quality:local python -m pytest -p no:cacheprovider app/tests -q
scripts.test:calc: npm run quality:api && docker run --rm -w /calc-engine ocidisblueprint-api-quality:local python -m pytest -p no:cacheprovider src/tests -q
scripts.test:pricing: npm run quality:api && docker run --rm -e PYTHONPATH=/pricing-engine/src -w /pricing-engine ocidisblueprint-api-quality:local python -m pytest -p no:cacheprovider tests -q
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose exec -T api alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:rollback: docker compose exec -T api alembic downgrade -1
scripts.db:seed: docker compose exec -T api python -m app.migrations.seed
scripts.smoke:storage: docker compose exec -T api python scripts/smoke_object_storage.py
scripts.lint:api: npm run quality:api && docker run --rm ocidisblueprint-api-quality:local ruff check --no-cache app /calc-engine/src /pricing-engine/src
scripts.type-check:api: npm run quality:api && docker run --rm ocidisblueprint-api-quality:local mypy app --ignore-missing-imports --no-error-summary --cache-dir=/tmp/mypy-cache
